parameters.command: =ssh -p 36000 root@192.168.21.236 'cd /root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant && set -a && [ -f .env.local ] && source .env.local; set +a && REQUEST_DS_TOKEN='"'"'{{$json.ds_token}}'"'"' PAYLOAD_B64='"'"'{{$json.payload_b64}}'"'"' REQUEST_ID='"'"'{{$json.request_id}}'"'"' nohup python3 tools/ine_ds_failed_auto_retry.py --payload-b64 "$PAYLOAD_B64" --ds-token "$REQUEST_DS_TOKEN" --request-id "$REQUEST_ID" >/tmp/ine_ds_failed_auto_retry_"$REQUEST_ID".log 2>&1 & echo "{\"accepted\":true,\"country\":\"ine\",\"request_id\":\"$REQUEST_ID\",\"log\":\"/tmp/ine_ds_failed_auto_retry_$REQUEST_ID.log\"}"'

nodes.name: 印尼机器启动后台重跑
